mapper.select: SELECT * FROM ledger_posting WHERE account_id = #{accountId} ORDER BY created_at DESC

SELECT lp.* FROM ledger_posting lp INNER JOIN accounts a ON lp.account_id = a.id WHERE lp.account_type = #{accountType} AND a.is_active = 1 AND ( (a.owner_type = 'PERSONAL' AND a.owner_user_id = #{ownerUserId}) OR (a.owner_type = 'FAMILY' AND a.owner_family_id = #{ownerFamilyId}) ) ORDER BY lp.created_at DESC
SELECT COALESCE(SUM(amount), 0) FROM ledger_posting WHERE account_id = #{accountId} AND posting_type = 'DEBIT'
SELECT COALESCE(SUM(amount), 0) FROM ledger_posting WHERE account_id = #{accountId} AND posting_type = 'CREDIT'
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO ledger_posting ( txn_id, posting_type, account_id, account_type, amount, shares, currency, note, account_balance_after, parent_account_balance_after, created_at ) VALUES ( #{txnId}, #{postingType}, #{accountId}, #{accountType}, #{amount}, #{shares}, #{currency}, #{note}, #{accountBalanceAfter}, #{parentAccountBalanceAfter}, NOW() )

INSERT INTO ledger_posting ( txn_id, posting_type, account_id, account_type, amount, shares, currency, note, account_balance_after, parent_account_balance_after, created_at ) VALUES
(#{posting.txnId}, #{posting.postingType}, #{posting.accountId}, #{posting.accountType}, #{posting.amount}, #{posting.shares}, #{posting.currency}, #{posting.note}, #{posting.accountBalanceAfter}, #{posting.parentAccountBalanceAfter}, NOW())
mapper.select: SELECT lp.* FROM ledger_posting lp INNER JOIN ledger_txn lt ON lp.txn_id = lt.txn_id WHERE lp.account_id = #{accountId} ORDER BY lt.requested_at ASC, lp.id ASC
